summary: DiskWise adopts a new smooth blue database icon everywhere — sidebar, Dock, installer, and website header.
changed: Brand icon — smooth flat database + checkmark artwork replaces the previous white-circle app icon
Icon pipeline — website/public/app-icon.png is the canonical master; builds resize it without reprocessing old raw artwork
Website header — top-left logo uses the same app-icon.png asset at correct 1024×1024 dimensions
fixed: App and installer icons — no longer regenerated from legacy raw artwork that showed a white square on dark UI
